creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 230892
"git diff" to update the port

- update 1.047 -> 1.051
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Module-Extract-Use

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p5
pkg 1.17.5
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- "make test" in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
